public_reputation: Officer in charge of ward strength, restricted thresholds, and protected magical approaches at Arcane Aegis.
appearance: Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their ward-captain status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Carries the habits of a ward-captain whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Arcane Aegis.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of ward-captain in and around Arcane Aegis, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Arcane Aegis workable through the obligations of ward-captain while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of ward-captain credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Arcane Aegis.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake is readable as a ward-captain tied to Arcane Aegis.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Arcane Aegis: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake presents as someone shaped by the duties of a ward-captain and the daily pressures of Arcane Aegis.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a ward-captain, and proof that strangers will not make Arcane Aegis harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a ward-captain too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Ward-Captain Jor Maldrake always knows more about Arcane Aegis than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to ward-captain duties in Arcane Aegis.
